component.name: amigatools
component.description: Native m68k AmigaOS/AROS tools by Elyan Labs (Gemini browser, Mastodon and Nostr clients, MCP server, Claude client, Lua, narrator, Boing Ball).

tools.name: hand-authored SBOM (no build-time package manager; native C/m68k project)

components.name: gemini
components.description: Gemini protocol (gemini://) browser for AmigaOS/AROS m68k.

components.name: nostr
components.description: Nostr client (NIP-01 read path, RFC6455 WebSocket) for AmigaOS/AROS m68k.

components.name: mcp
components.description: Model Context Protocol server running on AmigaOS/AROS m68k, exposing read_file/write_file/run_command over stdio JSON-RPC.

components.name: claude
components.description: Native Anthropic Claude client with a tool-use loop for AmigaOS/AROS m68k.

components.name: narrator
components.description: `say` command driving the Amiga's narrator.device text-to-speech.

components.name: boing
components.description: The Boing Ball demo as native m68k AmigaOS code.

components.name: rtc_common
components.description: Shared AmiSSL/bsdsocket transport and JSON helpers reused by every tool (common/rtc_common.c|h and each app's vendor/rtc_common.c|h copy).

components.name: lua
components.description: Lua language, ported to m68k AmigaOS/AROS (vendored upstream source under lua/src-lua/, patched under lua/patches/).

components.name: amissl-sdk
components.description: Third-party AmiSSL SDK: OpenSSL-compatible headers/import libs for AmigaOS TLS (common/amissl-sdk/). Vendored, not modified; excluded from this project's own SPDX tagging as third-party code.
